feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: King the Asix has teamed up with Resident Evil Village to show you all the joys of child rearing. It's funny moments like this that make the experience so worth it. Children are the future... Good thing I got a loving family and won't have to chase my dau
entry.content: King the Asix has teamed up with Resident Evil Village to show you all the joys of child rearing. It's funny moments like this that make the experience so worth it. Children are the future... Good thing I got a loving family and won't have to chase my dau

entry.title: I'm really cooking with something up with Force Network. I opened up an old project to review and copy some old code, but I had a stroke of inspiration! I wonder how something like Azure Dreams and Battle Network would mesh together so that's what wer're
entry.content: I'm really cooking with something up with Force Network. I opened up an old project to review and copy some old code, but I had a stroke of inspiration! I wonder how something like Azure Dreams and Battle Network would mesh together so that's what wer're

entry.title: So during my quest to find my daughter, I was attacked by this Oogie Boogie bag of flies wannabe. I was still learning the VR controls and set a mine on accident... I thought the explosion would kill us both and I tried to warn her but she just don't wann
entry.content: So during my quest to find my daughter, I was attacked by this Oogie Boogie bag of flies wannabe. I was still learning the VR controls and set a mine on accident... I thought the explosion would kill us both and I tried to warn her but she just don't wann

entry.title: I’m over here thinking I’m Leon in RE4 and I have to remember I’m Ethan in RE8. I’m just a dad tryna find his daughter, not a special ops whos been around the block! Good times….
entry.content: I’m over here thinking I’m Leon in RE4 and I have to remember I’m Ethan in RE8. I’m just a dad tryna find his daughter, not a special ops whos been around the block! Good times….

entry.title: Decided to post my favorite episode of Whole Fool & Friends on this last day of Black History Month. ironically and unfortunately a but relevant. Looking forward to making more episodes soonish.
entry.content: Decided to post my favorite episode of Whole Fool & Friends on this last day of Black History Month. ironically and unfortunately a but relevant. Looking forward to making more episodes soonish.

entry.title: Came across this old thing while looking for something else. Decided to take a break from all the administrative task I had to preform and dust this thing off. I wish I had a setup where I could run this with a real SNES but maybe later. Probably won’t do
entry.content: Came across this old thing while looking for something else. Decided to take a break from all the administrative task I had to preform and dust this thing off. I wish I had a setup where I could run this with a real SNES but maybe later. Probably won’t do

entry.title: 😅 I don’t get jumped scared very often but leave it to Resident Evil to do the treat and the VR to add a little razzle dazzle lmao. From what I’m hearing, RE9 has even more horrors and thrills!
entry.content: 😅 I don’t get jumped scared very often but leave it to Resident Evil to do the treat and the VR to add a little razzle dazzle lmao. From what I’m hearing, RE9 has even more horrors and thrills!

entry.title: Here me out… I lost my wife and my baby missing. Ethan needs a new boo thang and I think Dimitrescu might be the one lol Swear I be doing and saying whatever on stream 😂😂😂 #residentevil #funny #fyp #blerd #gaming
entry.content: Here me out… I lost my wife and my baby missing. Ethan needs a new boo thang and I think Dimitrescu might be the one lol Swear I be doing and saying whatever on stream 😂😂😂 #residentevil #funny #fyp #blerd #gaming

entry.title: I did not have a good time in the blood wine room 😭 I was just tryna chat it up and next thing you know I got creatures coming outta ever corner! But at least I made it through 😮‍💨 #residentevil #vrgaming #gaming #fyp #blerd
entry.content: I did not have a good time in the blood wine room 😭 I was just tryna chat it up and next thing you know I got creatures coming outta ever corner! But at least I made it through 😮‍💨 #residentevil #vrgaming #gaming #fyp #blerd

entry.title: Every time you turn the corner in Resident Evil its some outta pocket BS… 😫 I wonder what craziness I’ll see when I jump on later. If you see I am live then stop on by! #residentevil #vrgaming #gaming #fyp #blerd
entry.content: Every time you turn the corner in Resident Evil its some outta pocket BS… 😫 I wonder what craziness I’ll see when I jump on later. If you see I am live then stop on by! #residentevil #vrgaming #gaming #fyp #blerd

entry.title: This game is definitely more intense then RE7 was in VR, thats for damn sure lol. I am not sure if I’ll do the rest of the game on LIVE but imma finish what I started and pray the game doesn’t get any more scarier than that damn baby… #residentevil #blerd
entry.content: This game is definitely more intense then RE7 was in VR, thats for damn sure lol. I am not sure if I’ll do the rest of the game on LIVE but imma finish what I started and pray the game doesn’t get any more scarier than that damn baby… #residentevil #blerd

entry.title: RIP to my mans that got got while tying to get it out his system. I’m just glad no wolf zombie jumped out and gave me a number 2 no cheese. But seriously where is a worst place to die lol. #residentevil #blerd #gaming
entry.content: RIP to my mans that got got while tying to get it out his system. I’m just glad no wolf zombie jumped out and gave me a number 2 no cheese. But seriously where is a worst place to die lol. #residentevil #blerd #gaming

entry.title: I really thought that little bookshelf was gonna save me lmao. That zombie lycan just came around the front to get a taste Knowledge might be power but so is this tool 😅 #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vr
entry.content: I really thought that little bookshelf was gonna save me lmao. That zombie lycan just came around the front to get a taste Knowledge might be power but so is this tool 😅 #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vr

entry.title: After losing my wife, I thought Lady Dimitrescu could of been my new baby mama. Have demon zombie werewolf kids n ish… We was doing good until she tried to eat and kill me. We could’ve had something special. #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd
entry.content: After losing my wife, I thought Lady Dimitrescu could of been my new baby mama. Have demon zombie werewolf kids n ish… We was doing good until she tried to eat and kill me. We could’ve had something special. #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd

entry.title: Bruh there was a doll of my wife on the table and then it gave birth to this shit. This is one of the many reasons I’m pro-choice cause no one’s choosing this. I know I didn’t… Now quickly! What emotions was I feeling 😅 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming
entry.content: Bruh there was a doll of my wife on the table and then it gave birth to this shit. This is one of the many reasons I’m pro-choice cause no one’s choosing this. I know I didn’t… Now quickly! What emotions was I feeling 😅 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming

entry.title: Last week I tussled with the doll apparition thing and I was going through it. Just want to remind myself that playing this in VR was a choice. 😅 I should be LIVE in about one Resident hour for more Evil fun in this darn Village
entry.content: Last week I tussled with the doll apparition thing and I was going through it. Just want to remind myself that playing this in VR was a choice. 😅 I should be LIVE in about one Resident hour for more Evil fun in this darn Village

entry.title: Fuck tiktok and all its bullshit. Im really tired of the dumbass restrictions and suspensions. You can watch my shit on Youtube, Insta, Twitch, damn newr anywhere else 😤
entry.content: Fuck tiktok and all its bullshit. Im really tired of the dumbass restrictions and suspensions. You can watch my shit on Youtube, Insta, Twitch, damn newr anywhere else 😤

entry.title: Just minding my business while riding the elevator and somebody wanna play with lights and shit… Im tryna go to the room on the upper parts of the building not the Upper Room where jesuuus… #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming
entry.content: Just minding my business while riding the elevator and somebody wanna play with lights and shit… Im tryna go to the room on the upper parts of the building not the Upper Room where jesuuus… #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming

entry.title: I had a time messing with that possessed doll thing. To think she stole all my belongings and had the nerve to play in my face. Quick question… Does anyone read these captions I be writing? Im bout to put gibberish and random ish here to see. #residentevi
entry.content: I had a time messing with that possessed doll thing. To think she stole all my belongings and had the nerve to play in my face. Quick question… Does anyone read these captions I be writing? Im bout to put gibberish and random ish here to see. #residentevi

entry.title: Bro… I just need to find my daughter and now I done became a snack for this Never Ending Story ah weredog thing. Since the mod makes my model invisible it looks like the Hollow Man getting turned into dinner smdh… #residentevil #gaming #blerd #vrgaming #f
entry.content: Bro… I just need to find my daughter and now I done became a snack for this Never Ending Story ah weredog thing. Since the mod makes my model invisible it looks like the Hollow Man getting turned into dinner smdh… #residentevil #gaming #blerd #vrgaming #f

entry.title: Here I am minding my business trying to steal a boat key and then this ninja ah were-zombie appears outta nowhere and hashes my slinging slasher… smdh 😒 #residentevil #blerd #vrgaming #gaming
entry.content: Here I am minding my business trying to steal a boat key and then this ninja ah were-zombie appears outta nowhere and hashes my slinging slasher… smdh 😒 #residentevil #blerd #vrgaming #gaming

entry.title: I was planning this surprise for my wife’s birthday for months and I messed it up at the last minute… 😭 Surprise or not, she enjoyed her gift and we have a foolish time over the weekend. #funny #birthday #blerd #fyp
entry.content: I was planning this surprise for my wife’s birthday for months and I messed it up at the last minute… 😭 Surprise or not, she enjoyed her gift and we have a foolish time over the weekend. #funny #birthday #blerd #fyp

entry.title: I become a whole new person behind the wheel of a FPS like Far Cry but this ain’t that… 😅 I can’t just go in guns blazing like I did in the attempt before this one. Imma be a far cry if I don’t stop playing around lol. #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgami
entry.content: I become a whole new person behind the wheel of a FPS like Far Cry but this ain’t that… 😅 I can’t just go in guns blazing like I did in the attempt before this one. Imma be a far cry if I don’t stop playing around lol. #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgami

entry.title: Ethan be acting like Resident Evil 7 never happened. I shouldn’t compare him to Leon but by Leon’s second adventure he was suplexing dudes. Get it together Ethan or we ain’t never finding our daughter… 😒 #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming #
entry.content: Ethan be acting like Resident Evil 7 never happened. I shouldn’t compare him to Leon but by Leon’s second adventure he was suplexing dudes. Get it together Ethan or we ain’t never finding our daughter… 😒 #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming #

entry.title: Ethan really be working my nerves. He almost had me act outta character and say some inflammatory shit. If this was real then Ethan would lose his daughter frfr #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming
entry.content: Ethan really be working my nerves. He almost had me act outta character and say some inflammatory shit. If this was real then Ethan would lose his daughter frfr #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming

entry.title: If do decide to do so it would be a long while from now, but I think I want to do video game retrospectives. I love watching them and I don’t talk about the various aspects of games enough. I would love to do retrospectives of Falcom games like Ys and Tra
entry.content: If do decide to do so it would be a long while from now, but I think I want to do video game retrospectives. I love watching them and I don’t talk about the various aspects of games enough. I would love to do retrospectives of Falcom games like Ys and Tra

entry.title: two years ago I made a video talking about a secret game within Pokemon Puzzle Challenge. I should redo this video since I am so much better at this content creation thing lol #onthisday #pokemon #blerd #fyp #gaming
entry.content: two years ago I made a video talking about a secret game within Pokemon Puzzle Challenge. I should redo this video since I am so much better at this content creation thing lol #onthisday #pokemon #blerd #fyp #gaming

entry.title: So this was my second attempt to make it across this bridge thing and I am sorry to this man but I made Ethan fish food more times then I’d like you to admit 😅 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd
entry.content: So this was my second attempt to make it across this bridge thing and I am sorry to this man but I made Ethan fish food more times then I’d like you to admit 😅 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd

entry.title: Man what’s going on with Chris?! Took my wife and my daughter from me and now he sneaking up on me. He lucky I can throw these paws in the game but imma get my get back eventually 😤 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames
entry.content: Man what’s going on with Chris?! Took my wife and my daughter from me and now he sneaking up on me. He lucky I can throw these paws in the game but imma get my get back eventually 😤 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames

entry.title: This tunnel was about to be my new home because why you snarling as I am making my way downtown… Now I’m hoping zombies aint walking fast around me… #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames
entry.content: This tunnel was about to be my new home because why you snarling as I am making my way downtown… Now I’m hoping zombies aint walking fast around me… #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
